title: Bootloader handoff smoke stabilization
goal: Stabilize the bootloader-to-kernel handoff smoke path so failures distinguish image build, loader, serial marker, and kernel bootstrap causes.
next_actions: Run the bootloader smoke and capture the first failing phase if any.
Improve diagnostics for one ambiguous failure mode.
Record the expected marker and reproduction command in docs or smoke output.
acceptance: Bootloader smoke failures identify the failing phase.
Successful runs produce a stable serial marker.
The change is covered by a focused shell or CTest validation.
